LanguageData.FB_ResurrectedBiomassPart.label: resurrected biomass
LanguageData.FB_ResurrectedBiomassPart.description: Living colony biomass has replaced a missing body part. It functions reliably, but never fully matches the original tissue.
LanguageData.FB_ShellAdaptation.label: shell adaptation
LanguageData.FB_ShellAdaptation.description: This resurrected mind is gradually learning to control a body rebuilt and occupied by colony flesh.
LanguageData.FB_ShellAdaptation.stages.0.label: stabilizing
LanguageData.FB_ShellAdaptation.stages.1.label: disoriented
LanguageData.FB_ShellAdaptation.stages.2.label: severe rejection
